qa_pairs.question: Which county public safety entries from Castlegar have a crime rate of at most 150.0?

WHERE county_public_safety.crime_rate <= 150.0 AND county_public_safety.name = 'Castlegar'

JOIN city ON county_public_safety.county_id = city.county_id
WHERE city.asian <= 0.2 AND city.multiracial >= 13.0
